refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall enable achieving the customer-defined productivity target by optimizing equipment operation and task execution efficiency.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad and outcome-focused; refining it into sub-FRs clarifies specific functional aspects that contribute to productivity, enabling targeted design and verification.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure productivity metrics (m³/h or ton/h) during representative operations and verify that sub-functions contribute to meeting or exceeding the target.
sub_frs: FR1: Optimize equipment operational efficiency to maximize throughput.
FR2: Support effective task planning and execution to minimize idle time.
FR3: Provide real-time performance monitoring and feedback to operators.

candidate_dps: DP1: Advanced vehicle control algorithms to maximize operational efficiency.
DP2: Integrated task management system for scheduling and dispatching.
DP3: Real-time telemetry and feedback interface for operator awareness.
selected_dp.selected_dp: Combination of DP1, DP2, and DP3 to address the refined FRs holistically.

potential_sources: Interdependency between vehicle control and task management.
Data exchange requirements between telemetry and control modules.
coupling_check.notes: The selected DPs are logically coupled but designed to minimize unnecessary dependencies, supporting modularity.

assumptions_risks: Assumes reliable network connectivity for telemetry and tasking data.
Risk of performance degradation if vehicle control algorithms are not optimized.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Ensure clear interface definitions and modular separation to manage coupling.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Overall system integration including vehicle control, task management, and telemetry processing.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Bi-directional data flow for real-time performance monitoring and control feedback.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Input of task schedules and commands from higher-level planning systems.

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment as it integrates all selected DPs; low diffusion risk due to centralized control.
Contains vehicle control DP but less scope for task management and telemetry integration.
Limited containment for productivity DPs; higher diffusion risk if used for control logic.
Minimal relevance to productivity DPs; high diffusion risk if productivity logic is placed here.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing productivity-related DPs within the NGHE Solution module minimizes diffusion and supports integrated verification.
containment_risks: Potential complexity in NGHE Solution module may impact maintainability.
Risk of interface overload if too many functions are centralized.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Consider sub-module decomposition within NGHE Solution for scalability.

fr_dp_gate.reason: Refined FRs are well matched with selected DPs, covering operational efficiency, task management, and monitoring.

diffusion_risks: Centralizing multiple DPs in NGHE Solution may increase module complexity.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores support NGHE Solution as the best architectural boundary for these DPs.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed at the NGHE Solution level with telemetry and tasking interfaces supporting data collection.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of DPs to NGHE Solution module with well-defined external interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Plan for modular sub-division within NGHE Solution to manage complexity.
Define interface protocols explicitly to avoid integration issues.

decision.justification: The current level of decomposition and mapping from FR to DP to IM is consistent, feasible, and aligns with stakeholder needs and constraints.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Optimize equipment operational efficiency to maximize throughput.
FR2: Support effective task planning and execution to minimize idle time.
FR3: Provide real-time performance monitoring and feedback to operators.

revise.why: No immediate revision needed; proceed to next decomposition level.

assumptions: Vehicle control algorithms can be optimized for performance.
open_risks: Complexity management within NGHE Solution module.
